name: Tertiary Education Subsidy (TES / UniFAST)
description: Government subsidy for college students from low-income households to cover tuition and living allowance
benefits: Up to ₱60,000/year (tuition + allowance) for eligible college students in SUCs and private HEIs
documents: Proof of income (ITR, Certificate of No Income, or Barangay Indigency)
office: UniFAST through your college/university Financial Aid Office or CHED Regional Office
next_steps: Check TES availability at your college's Financial Aid Office
Ensure student is enrolled in a CHED-recognized program
Submit household income documents during TES application window
Monitor UniFAST portal (unifast.gov.ph) for grant status
